institutions.name: Supreme Court of Argentina
institutions.summary: The Supreme Court of Argentina officially documents live AI-enabled services in its court systems, including automatic plain-language summaries of judgments and other AI-supported tools introduced in 2025.
vendors: Dirección de Sistemas de la Corte Suprema de Justicia de la Nación
scopeNotes: Applies to published federal and national judgments shown through the Court's online viewer.
Includes appeal/resource classification, an internal assistant for jurisprudence and superintendence queries, and a public-facing Matrículas chatbot.
The Court described the AI summary system as fully operational in 2025.
reportedOutcomes: Clear-language summaries are meant to make judgments easier to understand.
The Court says AI accelerates initial case handling and provides 24/7 support in the Matrículas office.
By December 2025 the Court reported more than 110,000 AI-generated summaries.

institutions.name: Chamber of Deputies
institutions.summary: The Chamber of Deputies officially documents both institutional GenAI use in work processes and a formal 2025 AI-governance framework that explicitly covers generative AI.
scopeNotes: A communication manual page says new generative-AI applications are in development, including automatic transcription and summarization of public hearings.
Ato da Mesa 225/2025 covers AI systems in Chamber work processes, including generative AI, and creates ethics/governance mechanisms.
reportedOutcomes: The Chamber says the tool is intended to help journalists and broaden access to legislative debates.
The policy requires governance, monitoring, training, and risk controls for AI use in Chamber work.

activities.name: Generative-AI transcription and summarization for hearings
AI governance policy for Chamber work processes

evidenceRecords.outcomes: The Chamber says the tool is intended to help journalists and broaden access to legislative debates.

evidenceRecords.sourceSnippet: The act requires transparency when users interact with AI, continuous supervision, data/security safeguards, and guidelines that include 'IA generativa' in Chamber work processes.
evidenceRecords.outcomes: The policy requires governance, monitoring, training, and risk controls for AI use in Chamber work.

institutions.name: Supreme Court of Lithuania
institutions.summary: The Supreme Court of Lithuania publicly documented a court AI tool, TeDIA, for drafting press releases and issued generative-AI disclosure guidance for cassation filings.
scopeNotes: TeDIA drafts initial press-release texts from signed rulings; staff and judges review and edit outputs, and AI use is allowed only after the decision is officially signed and disclosed to the parties.
Updated filing recommendations require parties using generative AI tools for cassation complaints or other procedural documents to disclose that use and verify the content.

Generative AI disclosure guidance for cassation filings

institutions.name: National Assembly
institutions.summary: Multiple 2025-2026 sources document GenAI activity at the National Assembly, including an 'AI National Assembly' platform with parliament-specific generative AI and budget support for ChatGPT/Gemini use in lawmakers’ offices.
scopeNotes: National Assembly Secretariat budget guidance added 'generative AI service fees' as an eligible expense for MPs and office staff in 2026; insecure services such as DeepSeek were reportedly blocked.

Phase 1 reporting described parliament-specific generative AI for document creation, a National Assembly-specific LLM, RAG search/recommendation, and AI assistant functions; phase 1 is to be completed by 2026.

activities.name: Generative AI subscription support for lawmakers' offices
AI National Assembly big-data platform (AI국회)

evidenceRecords.sourceSnippet: The Fact reports the National Assembly Secretariat added 'generative AI service fees' to 2026 legislative/policy budgets, allowing MPs' offices and staff to expense ChatGPT and Gemini subscriptions.

institutions.name: Supreme People's Court of Vietnam
institutions.summary: The Supreme People's Court of Vietnam officially organized ChatGPT-focused court training and related AI capability-building, indicating documented GenAI-related institutional activity even though public evidence of operational deployment remains limited.
scopeNotes: The same Supreme People's Court news stream later referenced sovereign-AI training and virtual-assistant features for the court system.
reportedOutcomes: Official court notices show institution-wide exposure and skills-building around ChatGPT.

activities.name: ChatGPT introduction and court AI training initiative

evidenceRecords.sourceTitle: Hội nghị trực tuyến giới thiệu về ChatGPT và các tính năng mới của phần mềm Trợ lý ảo Tòa án
evidenceRecords.sourceSnippet: The Supreme People's Court said it held an online conference introducing ChatGPT and new features of the Court's virtual assistant ('Hội nghị trực tuyến giới thiệu về ChatGPT...').
evidenceRecords.outcomes: Official court notices show institution-wide exposure and skills-building around ChatGPT.

institutions.searchText: supreme people's court of vietnam vietnam national judicial national documented activity pilot evidence + master structure supreme court the supreme people's court of vietnam officially organized chatgpt-focused court training and related ai capability-building, indicating documented genai-related institutional activity even though public evidence of operational deployment remains limited. chatgpt openai the same supreme people's court news stream later referenced sovereign-ai training and virtual-assistant features for the court system. chatgpt introduction and court ai training initiative

institutions.name: National Assembly

evidenceRecords.sourceSnippet: The official parliamentary homepage presents general institutional information and news; no generative AI, LLM, ChatGPT, Copilot, or equivalent institutional tool is identified in the retrieved source.

evidenceRecords.sourceTitle: SPEAKER MUTTI LEADS A DELEGATION TO THE 57TH COMMONWEALTH PARLIAMENTARY ASSOCIATION AFRICA REGION CONFERENCE
